incident_report:
# Incident Report: Dungeon Run Seed 40

The run terminated at turn 51 after hitting the 50-turn limit with zero progress. Both Agent A and Agent B encountered 11 spurious_block anomalies distributed across their movement attempts (Agent A: turns 2, 6, 21, 23, 30, 41, 47; Agent B: turns 13, 25, 30, 34), which severely disrupted navigation and prevented any meaningful dungeon exploration. Neither agent obtained a key pickup or unlocked doors, and no messages were sent to the Dungeon Master for assistance or guidance—a critical oversight that suggests the agents either lacked awareness of the DM interaction mechanic or failed to recognize when anomalies necessitated external help. The high frequency of spurious_block anomalies (11 out of 51 turns) indicates either corrupted pathfinding or a dungeon layout with systematic blocking issues; the agents' inability to adapt strategy or request intervention resulted in complete mission failure.
